datasets.name: repository-questions
datasets.input: id, dataset, question, expectedNodeIds or expectedEvidence; optional expectedKeyFacts plus a separate answer ledger

datasets.name: external-repository-questions
datasets.input: 54 evidence-tagged relationship questions across pinned chi, Express, and Click revisions

answerLedger: Strict external JSONL judgments keyed by case id; stores correctness, found rubric facts, tokens, cost, and provenance but never raw answers.
qualityGates: Strict JSON thresholds can require fresh graph IDs and fail benchmark commands when recall, evidence recall, reciprocal rank, truncation, or case-count limits regress.
externalDatasets: The checked-in external suite uses pinned public repository commits. Other custom dataset names are accepted after the caller converts them to graph-query JSONL. Ravel does not claim built-in LOCOMO or LongMemEval corpus adapters.
